---
title: 'Financial Resources'
date: '2012-01-21T08:23:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2534211009432933853'
blogger_filename: '/2012/01/financial-resources.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Finances'
---

<br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-size: 24pt; line-height: 150%;">Websites</span> <o:p></o:p></b></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: center;"><b>The Following are Helpful Resources:<o:p></o:p></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%;"><b>Banking and Finance:<o:p></o:p></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><br /><ul><li><b>Education</b></li><ul><li><a href="http://www.crown.org/">www.crown.org</a></li><li><a href="http://www.daveramsey.com/">www.daveramsey.com</a></li><li><span style="font-family: Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt; line-height: 150%;"><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal;">&nbsp;</span></span><a href="http://www.handsonbanking.org/">www.handsonbanking.org</a></li><li><a href="http://www.practicalmoneyskills.com/">http://www.practicalmoneyskills.com/</a></li><li>Helpful free E-book of a similar nature by the Federal Reserve &nbsp;&nbsp;</li><ul><li><a href="http://www.bos.frb.org/education/pubs/banking2.pdf" style="font-size: 10pt; line-height: 19px;">http://www.bos.frb.org/education/pubs/banking2.pdf</a></li></ul><li><a href="http://www.myfico.com/">www.myfico.com</a></li><ul><li>THE Company that creates your credit score</li><li><a href="http://www.myfico.com/crediteducation/">http://www.myfico.com/crediteducation/</a></li></ul></ul><li><b>Credit Building</b></li><ul><li><a href="http://www.annualcreditreport.com/">www.annualcreditreport.com</a></li><li><a href="https://www.creditkarma.com/">https://www.creditkarma.com/</a></li></ul><li><b>Government Financial Sites</b></li><ul><li><a href="http://www.irs.gov/">www.irs.gov</a></li><li><span style="font-family: Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt; line-height: 19px;"><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal;">&nbsp;</span></span><a href="http://www.federalreserve.gov/">www.federalreserve.gov</a></li></ul></ul><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .75in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: list .75in; text-indent: -.25in;"><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .75in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: list .75in; text-indent: -.25in;"><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%;"><b>Ministry and Bible Principles:<o:p></o:p></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><br /><ul><li><a href="http://www.kcm.org/">www.KCM.org</a></li><li><a href="http://www.jdm.org/">www.JDM.org</a></li><li><a href="http://www.jerrysavelle.org/">www.JerrySavelle.org</a></li><li><a href="http://www.emic.org/">www.EMIC.org</a></li><li><a href="http://www.crown.org/">www.crown.org</a></li></ul><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; margin-left: .5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .5in; text-indent: -.25in;"><a href="http://www.amazon.com/Banking-Basics-Believers-Introduction-principles/dp/1453815619/ref=sr_1_2?ie=UTF8&amp;qid=1324162895&amp;sr=8-2" target="_blank">From Banking Basics For Believers, Available on Amazon</a><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.amazon.com/Banking-Basics-Believers-Introduction-principles/dp/1453815619/ref=sr_1_2?ie=UTF8&amp;qid=1324162895&amp;sr=8-2" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bankingbasicsforbelievers-cover-final-bb7ed64683ae.jpg" /></a></div><br /></div>
